- [W][patterns:agent:planner] [Sat 2026-03-21 04:54 GMT+8] 你是最强大脑。当前任务：为“OpenClaw（小龙虾🦞）安装指南”给我一版适合飞书文档的章节清单，要求：1）不超过 12 个一级/二级段落；2）突出第一次安装的最小成功闭环；3）列出关键配置节点；4）点出最容易踩坑的 5 类问题；5）只给大纲，不写正文。尽快回我。
- [W][patterns:agent:planner] [Sat 2026-03-21 04:02 GMT+8] 你是最强大脑。请为“OpenClaw 安装指南（不废话但详细、已成功落地不踩坑）”输出一个简洁但完整的大纲，面向第一次安装的人，优先 macOS，同时补充 Linux/服务器差异。要求：1）只给结构化大纲和关键配置节点；2）突出最容易踩坑的点；3）控制在 12 条以内；4）不要写整篇正文。直接回我结果。
[END UNTRUSTED DATA]
</relevant-memories>

A new session was started via /new or /reset. Run your Session Startup sequence - read the required files before responding to the user. Then greet the user in your configured persona, if one is provided. Be yourself - use your defined voice, mannerisms, and mood. Keep it to 1-3 sentences and ask what they want to do. If the runtime model differs from default_model in the system prompt, mention the default model. Do not mention internal steps, files, tools, or reasoning.
Current time: Monday, March 23rd, 2026 — 11:45 AM (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-03-23 03:45 UTC
